name: codexqb
description: CodexQB packages evidence-backed repo planning with project comprehension, autopsy, ontology, ledger continuity, traceability, QA audit, and gated handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Run evidence-backed repo planning and gated handoff.
interface.longDescription: CodexQB helps Codex inspect a repository, ask repo-aware intake questions, create a master project plan, autopsy existing project state, capture optional project comprehension and ontology artifacts, decompose the plan into phase-level sub-plans, audit coverage, evidence quality, confidence, traceability, readiness, and governance, then print a gated Goal-mode implementation handoff when the audit allows it.
defaultPrompt: Use $codexqb to inspect this repo and create an evidence-backed project comprehension plan.
Use $codexqb to autopsy this project, capture ontology/comprehension evidence, and create phase sub-plans.
Use $codexqb to audit evidence, traceability, readiness, and prepare the gated implementation handoff.
